name: friction tracker records each inline suppression event with the rule id being suppressed
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event inline-suppression --rule-id no-eval --justification migration-temp --at 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'event=inline-suppression' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'rule_id=no-eval' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'justification=migration-temp' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
